observed: bank account remains masked or displays Cuenta protegida
temporary bank reveal returns No fue posible recuperar el dato
portal username displays Usuario pendiente de registrar

fieldContractRootCause.canonicalRule: Portal username and bank account number are operational directory fields. Password is the only secret in this scope.
fieldContractRootCause.regression: Later provider, importer and validator layers removed usernames and bank numbers from the operational directory and required protected references for display and copy.
fieldContractRootCause.runtimeMismatch: Restored bank references can link current account rows to vault records retaining historical account IDs; the callable requires exact accountId equality and rejects otherwise valid references.

pipelineRootCause.finding: The workflow attempted to construct the product correction at execution time through one monolithic source transformer. It mixed owner edits, importers, providers, Academy, overlays and validators and enforced brittle exact-token counts across independent files.
evidence: The first static repair failed on an index cache token that is not owned by index.html.
The second static repair failed because Academia legitimately contains contentVersion 1.228 twice while the transformer required one occurrence.
pipelineRootCause.correctiveRule: The complete multi-file patch must be assembled directly and audited before workflow execution. The workflow may validate and publish evidence only; it must never transform source files or generate the product patch.

nextAllowedStep: Prepare the complete 1.0.38 correction as a direct atomic multi-file patch outside the workflow. Audit every final file and the full owner/contract/Academy/validator matrix without executing a gate, accessing Firestore or reading the vault. Do not create another request until the exact committed patch already exists and the workflow has been reduced to validation-only.
